'''Loro Ecls''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] who managed the [[Gelgelar Free Port/Legends|Gelgelar Free Port]] on the planet [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] with the assistance of his large family. They lived in a warren of water-tight tunnels dug underneath the settlement.

Ecls was wanted by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] for [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and shipjacking. He was a skilled forger and [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] player.

His sister [[Nofre Ecls]], who ran the [[Nofre Repair Bay]], was involved with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}
